name: Detroit Diesel DTC starter (J1939 SPN-FMI + GHG17)

dtcs.description: Detroit — Accelerator pedal position sensor 1 voltage low
Detroit — Engine intake manifold pressure circuit voltage high
Detroit — Fuel rail pressure sensor circuit voltage low
Detroit — Aftertreatment 1 SCR catalyst NOx inlet high

repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.
2) Inspect the affected sensor / actuator wiring for chafing, corrosion, or loose connectors.
3) Measure circuit resistance + supply voltage with a multimeter.
4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.
5) Replace the defective component if all wiring tests pass.

dtcs.description: Detroit — DPF differential pressure above normal range
Detroit — DEF dosing valve circuit voltage low

repair_guidance: 1) Read freeze-frame data and verify the fault is current.
2) Inspect the affected sensor / actuator wiring for chafing, corrosion, or loose connectors.
3) Measure circuit resistance + supply voltage with a multimeter.
4) Compare live data against expected values per OEM service data.
5) Replace the defective component if all wiring tests pass.

dtcs.description: Detroit — DEF tank level inducement (warning derate)
